name: Stytch
description: Monitor Stytch authentication platform for user management and passwordless auth compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Stytch at https://stytch.com/dashboard/api-keys
2. Copy your Project ID and Secret (use Live keys for production)
3. Base64 encode 'project_id:secret'
4. Enter the encoded value below

credentialFields.label: Encoded Credentials
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode 'project_id:secret'. Found in Stytch Dashboard → API Keys. Command: echo -n 'project-live-xxxxx:secret-live-xxxxx' | base64

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Stytch authenticated users to audit authentication platform access

checks.name: 2FA
checks.description: Verifies Stytch MFA methods are configured for enhanced authentication security
